platformEvidence: X-Powered-By: HostingerWebsiteBuilder, platform: hostinger, zyrosite.com CDN, LiteSpeed server

lighthouse.note: Hostinger CDN blocked headless Lighthouse. Use PageSpeed Insights web UI for manual scores.

tier1.name: Unique meta title + description per page
tier1.evidence: Homepage title duplicated in OG. Multiple pages share similar generic titles. Title contains business name twice.

tier1.name: Single H1 + proper heading hierarchy
tier1.evidence: Homepage has 2 H1 tags: 'Professional Pressure Washing Services' and 'Professional Pressure Washing Services in Spokane'. Should be exactly 1.

tier1.name: JSON-LD Schema (LocalBusiness, BreadcrumbList, FAQ)
tier1.evidence: Zero script[type=application/ld+json] elements found on any page. No structured data whatsoever.

tier1.name: Canonical URL on every page
tier1.evidence: Canonical tags present on crawled pages.

tier1.name: Image optimization (WebP/AVIF, alt text, dimensions)
tier1.evidence: Images use title attributes but inconsistent alt text. Format is JPG, no WebP/AVIF optimization detected.

tier1.name: Breadcrumbs (visible + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD)
tier1.evidence: No visible breadcrumb navigation. No BreadcrumbList schema.

tier1.name: Internal cross-linking with anchor rotation
tier1.evidence: Basic nav links exist but no contextual cross-linking within content. No anchor text variation.

tier2.name: Open Graph + Twitter Card meta
tier2.evidence: OG title, description present. Twitter card status unconfirmed.

tier2.name: Font optimization (preload, swap)
tier2.evidence: Google Fonts loaded via preconnect but no font-display:swap detected. No preload for critical fonts.

tier2.name: Preconnect to external origins
tier2.evidence: Link headers include preconnect to assets.zyrosite.com, fonts.googleapis.com, fonts.gstatic.com, cdn.zyrosite.com.

tier2.name: Skip-to-content link
tier2.evidence: No skip-to-content link found. First focusable element is the logo.

tier2.name: Color contrast 4.5:1 (WCAG AA)
tier2.evidence: Text uses dark colors on light backgrounds. Visual inspection indicates adequate contrast ratios.

tier2.name: Keyboard navigation + focus indicators
tier2.evidence: Tab navigation works. Visible focus indicators present on interactive elements.

tier2.name: ARIA labels on interactive elements
tier2.evidence: Some buttons have ARIA labels. Social media icon links may lack descriptive labels.

tier2.name: FAQ schema on service pages
tier2.evidence: No FAQ schema detected on any service page.

tier3.name: Security headers (CSP, X-Frame, Referrer)
tier3.evidence: HSTS present (max-age=63072000). X-XSS-Protection: 1. X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff. CSP is frame-ancestors only (minimal). No Referrer-Policy header. No X-Frame-Options header.

tier3.name: HTTPS enforcement
tier3.evidence: HSTS with includeSubDomains and preload. Full HTTPS enforcement.

tier3.name: Custom 404 page
tier3.evidence: Generic 'Page not found' page with no custom branding, navigation, or helpful links.

vertical.name: LocalBusiness JSON-LD with NAP
vertical.evidence: No LocalBusiness schema. NAP visible in footer but not machine-readable.

vertical.name: ServiceType schema per service
vertical.evidence: No ServiceType schema on any of the 9 service pages.

vertical.name: Service area pages (GeoJSON/areaServed)
vertical.evidence: 7 county pages exist (Spokane, Adams, Ferry, Stevens, Lincoln, Pend Oreille, Whitman) but no GeoJSON or areaServed schema.

vertical.name: Google Business Profile link
vertical.evidence: No GBP link found anywhere on the site.

vertical.name: Click-to-call (tel: links)
vertical.evidence: Phone number in header with tel: link for click-to-call.

vertical.name: Review / testimonial structured data
vertical.evidence: Zero reviews, testimonials, or star ratings anywhere on the site.

vertical.name: Contractor license displayed
vertical.evidence: WA State Contractor Reg #3GENPGP773M4, Business License #604 912 358, ProtectMyHome.net verification in footer.

legal.name: Terms of Service (/terms)
legal.evidence: No terms of service page found.

legal.name: Cookie Consent (if tracking present)
legal.evidence: Analytics tracking present but no cookie consent banner detected.

issues.title: Zero Structured Data (JSON-LD) on Any Page
issues.description: None of the 21 pages have LocalBusiness, Service, BreadcrumbList, or FAQ schema. Google and AI search engines have no structured way to understand your business.

issues.title: No Privacy Policy, Terms, or Accessibility Statement
issues.description: All three legally required pages are missing. ADA compliance risk and CCPA/GDPR violation if tracking is active.

issues.title: No Reviews or Testimonials
issues.description: Zero social proof on the entire site. For a service business, trust is the #1 conversion factor.

issues.title: No Breadcrumbs
issues.description: No visible breadcrumb navigation and no BreadcrumbList JSON-LD. Google uses breadcrumbs to understand site hierarchy.

issues.title: Duplicate H1 Tags on Homepage
issues.description: Homepage has 2 H1 tags. Should be exactly 1 per page for proper heading hierarchy.

issues.title: Duplicate Meta Titles
issues.description: Homepage title contains business name twice. Pages share similar generic titles rather than unique keyword-targeted titles.

issues.title: No Google Business Profile Link
issues.description: No GBP link anywhere. This is the primary local search asset for a service business.

issues.title: No Cookie Consent with Active Tracking
issues.description: Analytics tracking is active but no cookie consent mechanism detected. CCPA/GDPR compliance risk.

issues.title: Thin Content on Service Pages
issues.description: Most service pages have only 120-200 words. Google considers pages under 300 words thin content.

issues.title: No Before/After Photo Gallery
issues.description: Pressure washing is one of the most visual services. Before/after photos are the single most compelling conversion tool.

issues.title: Generic 404 Page
issues.description: 404 page shows generic 'Page not found' with no branding, navigation, or helpful links.

issues.title: No Skip-to-Content Link
issues.description: Missing skip-to-content link for keyboard/screen reader users. WCAG 2.1 AA requirement.

strengths.title: Contact Form Present
strengths.description: Working contact form on /contact page (Name, Email, Message). Enhancement opportunity: add service type and address fields.

strengths.title: Strong Service Coverage (9 Services)
strengths.description: Excellent breadth: Pressure Washing, Soft Washing, Graffiti Removal, Headstone Cleaning, Fuel Stations, Drive-Throughs, Roof Treatments, Courts & Patios, Building Exteriors.

strengths.title: County-Level Geo Pages (7 Counties)
strengths.description: Spokane, Adams, Ferry, Stevens, Lincoln, Pend Oreille, and Whitman counties each have dedicated pages.

strengths.title: WA State Contractor Credentials
strengths.description: Contractor Reg #3GENPGP773M4, Business License #604 912 358, ProtectMyHome.net verification displayed in footer.

strengths.title: Women & Minority-Owned Business
strengths.description: Differentiator mentioned but underutilized. Government and enterprise contracts actively seek W/MBE vendors.

strengths.title: Security Headers Present
strengths.description: HSTS, X-XSS-Protection, X-Content-Type-Options all properly configured. Strong baseline security posture.

strengths.title: Click-to-Call Enabled
strengths.description: Phone number in header uses tel: link for mobile click-to-call functionality.
